topic: My doorbell camera records a child knocking on my door every night at three seventeen but no one is ever there when I check
title: My Doorbell Camera Records a Child Knocking Every Night at Three Seventeen | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My doorbell camera records a child knocking on my door every night at three seventeen.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a black plastic video doorbell mounted on a beige suburban porch wall, the small black camera lens reflecting porch light, a dark wooden front door slightly visible to the right, the porch deck in dim shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Quiet suburban cul de sac. Connecticut. Lived here four years.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of a quiet suburban cul de sac at dusk, modest two story colonial houses on both sides, asphalt loop with a single street lamp, no cars visible, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I always lock the porch gate at ten.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand at a white wooden porch gate latch, the bronze latch being slid closed, a wide suburban porch beyond the gate, late evening dim lighting, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First clip came in last March. Small figure in a striped shirt at the door.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a doorbell camera video frame on a phone screen at night, showing the back of a small child in a horizontal striped shirt standing on a porch facing a dark front door, only the child's back visible, porch in greenish night vision tones, vertical 9:16 framing

wide shot of an empty suburban porch at night seen from a partially opened front door, the porch boards bare, a single porch light on overhead, the cul de sac dark beyond, no figure, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Same shirt. Same time. Same three knocks every night since.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a doorbell camera frame on a phone screen, the same small child in a striped shirt seen from behind on the porch, the timestamp three seventeen visible in the corner, night vision green tones, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I stayed up to catch him.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an adult man's hand holding back a sheer curtain in a dim living room window, the curtain rod above visible, the dark porch and front door faintly visible through the glass, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The camera caught him. My eyes did not.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a living room interior at night, a phone on the coffee table showing the doorbell camera frame with a small child silhouette on the porch, the actual front door visible across the room with the porch beyond appearing empty through a side window, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I asked the neighbors. No one has a son the right age on this street.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of a suburban cul de sac in daylight, two story colonial homes visible, a man in a jacket standing on the sidewalk seen from behind talking to a neighbor on a front lawn, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week the clip showed him turning toward the camera.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a doorbell camera frame on a phone screen at night, the small child in the striped shirt now angled toward the camera with his face indistinct and shadowed, his small hand raised toward the door, night vision green tones, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He waved. Then he pointed at me through the bedroom window.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of the upstairs bedroom window of a suburban house seen from the porch below at night, a faint warm glow inside the room, the curtain still, the porch in foreground in deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I unplugged the camera last Tuesday. He is still knocking. I can hear him now.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an unplugged doorbell camera mount on a porch wall, exposed wires hanging from the bracket, the porch dark behind it, faint outline of a dark front door visible to the side, vertical 9:16 framing
